engine.ladder_reasoning: Sells a defined manufacturing capability with a full product catalog, prices and cart — the visitor evaluates the packaging product/producer (features, proof, price), which is a THING evaluation, not trusting a named person or browsing a portfolio.

goal.one_action: get a quote / order custom packaging (browse catalog then WhatsApp CS or add-to-cart checkout)

structure.archetype_note: Full WooCommerce e-commerce site with cart/checkout/wishlist/login plus a marketing/company shell — not a single-conversion landing site.

mapped.observed_as: PT. YOGYAKARTAS MEGA GRAFIKA / VISI DAN MISI

unmapped.observed: Kategori Produk with per-category counts + add-to-cart / prices (Box 412, Paper Bag 282…)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A real e-commerce catalog with SKUs, prices and cart is not a marketing section — no canonical id covers a shoppable product grid

unmapped.observed: You may like it (recommended products with prices, Select options, View cart/Checkout)
unmapped.why_no_fit: WooCommerce upsell/recommendation + cart flow — outside the single-conversion section model

proposed_new.name: storefront-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: WooCommerce with prices (Rp 600, Rp900/piece), add-to-cart, Select options, View cart / Checkout, wishlist and login/register — an on-site cart+checkout selling one-time goods

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full; 4 of 10 pages captured but nav, CTAs, commerce and proof signals are unambiguous — clearly an e-commerce manufacturer store.

gap_findings: Site's job is not one conversion action — it is a full WooCommerce storefront (cart/checkout/wishlist/account), so in_icp:false; the taxonomy has no engine or mechanism for browse-and-buy commerce.
Multi-branch structure: two offices each with own address, map embed, and dedicated WhatsApp CS agents — no canonical section for per-branch contact blocks.
Shoppable catalog with live prices and add-to-cart cannot be expressed by the canonical section list (mapped to pricing/miscellaneous only approximately).
